titleStmt.title: SII 19.414: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 414. (A.R. No. 336 of 1904.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This gives details of the endowment (recorded in No. 413 above.) of the village Munainariyār Marudaṅguḍi, and states that the income was to be utilised for offerings and worship to Paramēśvara and for the maintenance of the yōgis performing worship to the deity (No. 68, Pud. Ins. Texts).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecarivaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1Āvatu tirunalakkuṉṟattu tirumulaṭṭāṉattup perumāṉaṭi
kaḷukku maturāntaka Irukkuveḷāyiṉa Ātittaṉ vikkiramakecarieṉ ceyta tevatāṉam kuṉṟiyūrnāṭṭu muṉai
nariyār marutaṅkuṭi Uṭumpoṭi Āmai tavaḻntatu puṟṟun teṟṟiyum palluruviṟ payaṉmaramun taṟitaraku taṭṭārpā
ṭṭamum Epperpaṭṭatu Aṭaṅkalākac ceytukuṭutteṉ Itaṉāl parameśvararkkut tiruvamirtum tiruvamirtukku veṇṭu
m vicam Uṭpaṭavum tiruvārātiṉai ceyyum yokiyārkku niyati nellu nilakkaṭakkālāl 3 10 mukkuṟuṇiyum kaccoṇa
mum maṉṟāṭip pirantaṉiyaṉ tevakuṭiyāka Ipparicu ceytu kuṭutteṉ Ātittaṉ vikkiramakecari Eṉ Itu panmāheśvararirakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.414 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
